Row.Text: -100% [icon:YIELD_GOLD] in [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_DISTANT_LANDS_TOOLTIP]Distant Land[/TIP] [icon:YIELD_TOWNS] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_TOWN_TOOLTIP]Towns[/TIP]. [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_DISTANT_LANDS_TOOLTIP]Distant Land[/TIP] [icon:YIELD_TOWNS] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_TOWN_TOOLTIP]Towns[/TIP] generate [icon:UNIT_TREASURE_FLEET] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_TREASURE_CONVOY_TOOLTIP]Treasure Convoys[/TIP] worth 1 Cargo each.

-100% [icon:YIELD_GOLD] in [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_DISTANT_LANDS_TOOLTIP]Distant Land[/TIP] [icon:YIELD_CITIES] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_CITIES_TOOLTIP]Cities[/TIP]. [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_DISTANT_LANDS_TOOLTIP]Distant Land[/TIP] [icon:YIELD_CITIES] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_CITIES_TOOLTIP]Cities[/TIP] generate [icon:UNIT_TREASURE_FLEET] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_TREASURE_CONVOY_TOOLTIP]Treasure Convoys[/TIP] worth 1 Cargo each.

-5 [icon:YIELD_GOLD] on [icon:CITY_URBAN] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_DISTRICT_TOOLTIP]Districts[/TIP] in [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_HOMELANDS_TOOLTIP]Homeland[/TIP] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_SETTLEMENT_TOOLTIP]Settlements[/TIP]. [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_DISTANT_LANDS_TOOLTIP]Distant Land[/TIP] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_SETTLEMENT_TOOLTIP]Settlements[/TIP] generate [icon:UNIT_TREASURE_FLEET] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_TREASURE_CONVOY_TOOLTIP]Treasure Convoys[/TIP] worth 1 Cargo each.
-20 [icon:YIELD_GOLD] on [icon:YIELD_TOWNS] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_TOWN_TOOLTIP]Towns[/TIP] without the [icon:PROJECT_TOWN_INTERNAL_TRADE] Internal Trade Town Specialization.

-5 [icon:YIELD_SCIENCE] and [icon:YIELD_CULTURE] for each [icon:NAR_REW_TRADITION_SLOT] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_SOCIAL_POLICY_TOOLTIP]Social Policy[/TIP] , but not [icon:TRADITION] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_TRADITION_TOOLTIP]Tradition[/TIP], slotted.
